text.title: Postmortem Action Item SLO Tracking Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to stand up the ledger end-to-end.

step.name: confirm-preconditions
step.input: Incident count, SLO policy, owner availability
step.action: Verify ≥3 incidents/year, published SLO, and a named owner.
step.decision-gate: If any precondition missing, STOP — methodology does not apply.

step.name: commit-ledger-skeleton
step.action: Commit `ledger-skeleton.md` with fixed columns + header (owner, review_cadence, retention_months).

step.name: backfill-recent-incidents
step.action: Add one row per action-item from recent postmortems with evidence_link + slo_class + slo_due.

step.name: schedule-review
step.action: Schedule the published cadence review; auto-generate `review-digest.md` per cycle.

step.name: wire-overdue-alerts
step.action: Add an automation (CI cron / Linear automation) that flags rows where today > slo_due.

step.name: validate-and-archive
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-postmortem-action-item-slo-tracking.py --file ledger.json`. Archive rows older than retention_months to cold storage.
